profile.name: Tal Shterzer
profile.summary: 17+ years of progressive engineering leadership, building and modernizing software systems across .NET, cloud-native architecture on Azure, and AI-augmented development workflows. I lead teams through complex cloud migrations and enterprise modernization, and I'm equally comfortable defining strategy at the whiteboard and shipping code in review.

experience.title: Development Manager
experience.company: Roga Partners / BekTek Inc. / SmartLinx Solutions
highlights: Lead, mentor and coach an 11-engineer squad; own hiring, performance reviews, and career development
Migrating an on-prem monolith to a distributed application on Microsoft Azure using .NET Core C# and React
Fully containerized ecosystem deployed independently on Azure Container Apps
Built CI/CD pipelines from GitHub to Azure using GitHub Actions
Architected a big-data path from Azure SQL OLTP to Snowflake OLAP via OneLake (Microsoft Fabric) and Apache Iceberg
Established ETL/ELT ingestion using Azure Data Factory
Championed adoption of AI coding agents (Claude Code, GitHub Copilot) across the development workflow

experience.title: Systems Architect & Senior Developer
highlights: Led a document-retrieval platform for enterprise customer accounts with a Web API for new document types and source applications, on .NET 8.0
Designed and deployed software through Azure DevOps and GitHub
Led a B2B project for inter-company report exchange on .NET 8.0 and Azure
Modernized legacy systems by transitioning to microservices with gRPC and Protocol Buffers

experience.title: Server-Side Team Lead
highlights: Owned a Data Loss Prevention (DLP) security product including BI for large organizations on Microsoft SSAS
Built the system in .NET 4.0 with WPF, WCF Services, and SQL Server 2008

experience.title: Development Manager
highlights: Led an 8-person project for the Ministry of Housing: 4 developers, 2 analysts, 2 QA
Designed and implemented information-system solutions in .NET 3.5, BizTalk, and SQL Server

experience.title: Team Leader
highlights: Managed a 9-engineer team building a desktop application and website features
Drove integrations with social networks including Facebook
Built services with WPF, ASP.NET MVC, and JavaScript
